DECLARATION OF FRANK P AGNOST, JR IN SUPPORT OF RESPONSE TO DEFT'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS FILED BY INTERVENOR CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANT MARIA SELIG'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED SUFFICIENT BASIS FOR INDEPENDENT NEGLIGENCE. APPEARANCES- ATTY. J. KEVIN MORRISON OF THE LAW FIRM OF JONES, CLIFOORD & JOHNSON, TEL. NO. 431-5310 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMES R. NICHOLS, JR., TEL. NO. (805) 569-3931 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY MARIA SELIG;
ATTY. FRANK AGNOST, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3873 APPEARING FOR THE INTERVENOR.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT MARIA SELIG'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED SUFFICIENT BASIS FOR INDEPENDENT NEGLIGENCE. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/AY
